steps.title: Use parallel distinct lines
steps.content: A system has no solution when the two lines are parallel and distinct. So the second equation must have the same left side, $x-3y$, but a different constant from $7n$.

steps.title: Choose the distinct equation
steps.content: The equation $x-3y=4n$ is parallel to $x-3y=7n$ and distinct because $n>0$, so $4n\ne7n$. The answer is D.
